title: Use classical shared vocabulary without claiming one universal Qimen algorithm

positions.summary: Compute the project-selected rotating-plate hour chart with Chaibu ju selection and explicit provenance.
Use the classical source only for shared nine-palace, star, door, spirit, and dunjia vocabulary, not as proof of every project rotation choice.

default_policy.rationale: A reproducible engine requires one named algorithm while preserving the narrower scope of classical corroboration.

user_disclosure: This implementation is the named Chaibu rotating-plate lineage; classical sources corroborate shared structures but do not make it a universal Qimen standard.
